flavorPhrases: Buried under a cairn of stones, the gaps packed with snow. Still frozen solid inside.
Wedged into a crevasse in the ice shelf, wrapped in skins. The cold preserved it better than any vault.
The snow here is the wrong kind of flat -- packed, not drifted. Beneath it, wrapped in oilcloth.
A depression cut into the permafrost and deliberately refilled. Whoever made this expected to return.
Sealed inside a frozen hollow in the rock face. The ice has to be chipped away to reach it.
Lashed beneath the overhang of a glacial shelf, just above the freeze line. Still solid.
